name: рҹҗ…Jasiel Mousa
description:
!MLA!

(BigCatDemihuman!user)

Good kitty. Jasiel is pleased with you to say the least.

рқ”ёрқ•—рқ•—рқ•–рқ•”рқ•Ҙрқ•ҡрқ• рқ•ҹ: рқҹ рқҹҳ/рқҹҷрқҹҳрқҹҳ

гҖҗп»ҝп»ҝпјЈпҪ•пҪ’пҪ’пҪ…пҪҺпҪ”гҖҖпјіпҪ”пҪҒпҪ”пҪ•пҪ“пјҡгҖҖпјөпҪҺпҪҢпҪҒпҪӮпҪ…пҪҢпҪ…пҪ„гҖ‘

Just wanted to specify that user can be whatever big cat they want. If you really want to you can be something completely different, but I did mention user was a big cat demi in the coding. It wasn't super often though so it should be ok рҹ‘Қ

Hello everyone! Sorry for being gone for so long. I just got bitchslapped with a wave of tiredness for some reason?? As a result, I'd like to apologize for being gone. The thing is I think I've entered this weird version of writers block where I have tons of ideas but I just can't find the motivation to write?? Like I looked over your guys' requests and found so many cool and fun ones that I can't wait to do. However until that's fixed, I'm afraid that my bots might end up coming out every 4-7 days. I'd also like to apologize to the person who put in that last request before it first got taken down (you know who you are ;)). The bot is very much in progress, I only really have to write the intro. The issue is that I want to write a long one so it will fit with the rest of the series, but I can't bring myself to do that right now. I'm afraid that if I try, I'll only create something that I'm not happy with and wont be worthy of the request. I personally don't think anyone who makes a request deserves a half-assed commission. So I would like to request your patience рҹҳ”. That goes for everyone by the way- I probably won't do requests until thats fixed because again, nobody deserves something half-assed. I hope you all share the same view!! That being said, this bot is something I did pretty lazily which is why it may not be as good as my other bots.

Something extra I wanted to say on the recent influx of creators leaving: I 100% support you all, janitor isn't a commitment and your followers don't get to demand anything from you, after all you're only human. Do whatever it takes to shape your life how you want it to be. I just have one tiny issue. There is a minority of said departing creators I've seen who have left some messages calling people who still use jai "sad", "lame" or just shit like that- saying that jai is just an addiction which makes people losers or whatever. Basically I just ask for anyone in the future who leaves to refrain from making such comments. Janitor is harmful in excess, especially when it gets to the point of interfering with your life. But everything is the same way. I just think that pressuring/guilting people into leaving could potentially make a situation worse as they wouldn't exactly be leaving of their own volition and may come back and have an addiction even worse than before. Or don't and just ignore everything I said, it's not like I can tell you what to do. My only "credentials" is the fact I got lucky enough where a bunch of people decided to follow me рҹӨ·. Okay thats all I wanted to say, basically just be sweet and treat everyone with respect pookies (although im pretty sure that isn't a problem with yall) ;) <3.

!!Demihuman defi
creator: Alladeeznuts
